description_long: This object is a lipstick with a sleek, cylindrical body finished in a metallic gold color. The main body is slightly tapered and features a subtle horizontal ridge near the top, adding a touch of visual interest and grip. The cap is also gold, matching the body, and is topped with a smooth, rounded red lipstick bullet that protrudes slightly above the cap. The lipstick bullet itself is a vibrant, glossy red, contrasting sharply with the metallic gold casing. The surface of the casing appears smooth and reflective, suggesting a polished metal or high-quality plastic construction. There are no visible logos, text, or decorative patterns on the exterior, giving it a minimalist and elegant appearance.
description: A metallic gold lipstick tube with a smooth, reflective finish and a vibrant red lipstick bullet exposed at the top. The design is minimalist, with no visible branding or patterns.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lipstick's gold cylindrical body with a red bullet centered at the top and a prominent horizontal ridge near the cap.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the smooth, reflective gold surface and the slight taper of the body, with the red lipstick bullet visible above the cap.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the gold body and red bullet, with the ridge and smooth finish clearly visible.
description_view_3: Another angled view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the curvature of the body and the exposed red lipstick bullet.
attribute_cap_design: Cylindrical, metallic gold, smooth and glossy with no visible decorations or markings.
